assistantInputAction.fixation: Record biological fixation inputs for the current season.

assistant.title: AI Assistant
assistant.subtitle: Get help with farming questions

chat.description: Ask concise questions with context for more accurate advice.

context.title: Season Information
context.label: Context
context.description: Add context for more relevant AI advice.
context.placeholder: Example: Rice, tillering stage, light clay soil, drip irrigation...

scope.title: Note: Support Scope
scope.description: The assistant focuses on agriculture-related questions.
scope.supported: Suggests crop care, nutrition, pest control, and seasonal scheduling.
scope.notSupported: Does not support politics, finance, or software technology topics.

quickPrompts.yellowLeaves: How to treat yellow leaves on rice?
quickPrompts.leafRoller: Signs and prevention of leaf roller pests?
quickPrompts.cornFertilizer: How often to fertilize corn with NPK?

coffeeFlowering.label: Coffee - Flowering
coffeeFlowering.value: Coffee plant, flowering stage, basalt red soil, drip irrigation.

fruitTrees.label: Fruit Trees
fruitTrees.value: Fruit trees in year 3, currently bearing young fruit, alluvial soil.

security.title: Security & Account
security.passwordRecommendation: Recommended to update password every 3-6 months.

imageSearch.title: Search by image
imageSearch.description: Upload a crop or product photo to generate search keywords and find available marketplace products.
imageSearch.authTitle: Sign in to search by image
imageSearch.authMessage: This AI feature is available only to signed-in buyer accounts.
imageSearch.buyerOnlyMessage: Please use a buyer account to search marketplace products by image.
imageSearch.uploadHint: Drag and drop or choose JPG, PNG, WEBP. Original image max size is 8MB.
imageSearch.keywordPlaceholder: Example: tomato, leafy greens, ST25 rice...

states.idle: Choose a clear product image to start analysis.
states.analyzing: Analyzing the image and searching for matching products...
states.success: Matching products were found for this image.
states.lowConfidence: AI is not confident enough to search automatically. Edit the keyword and search manually.
states.empty: No matching products found. Edit the keyword or try another image.
states.error: Image analysis is unavailable right now.

errors.unsupportedType: Only JPG, PNG, or WEBP images are supported.
errors.tooLarge: Original image max size is 8MB. Please choose a smaller image.
errors.generic: Image analysis failed. You can still enter a keyword to search.
errors.ERR_MARKETPLACE_IMAGE_SEARCH_INVALID_IMA: The image is invalid. Please choose a clearer image.
errors.ERR_MARKETPLACE_IMAGE_SEARCH_IMAGE_TOO_L: The uploaded image is too large. Please choose a smaller image.
errors.ERR_MARKETPLACE_IMAGE_SEARCH_UNSUPPORTED: This image format is not supported.
errors.ERR_MARKETPLACE_IMAGE_SEARCH_AI_UNAVAILA: Image AI is temporarily unavailable. Enter a keyword to search.
errors.ERR_MARKETPLACE_IMAGE_SEARCH_RATE_LIMITE: You have used too many image searches. Please try again later.
